meta.description: Core Crusade rules — Order of Battle, Crusade Cards, XP, Requisitions, Battle Honours, Battle Scars

orderOfBattle.description: List of all units in your Crusade force
orderOfBattle.supplyUsed: Combined points values of all units on Order of Battle — cannot exceed Supply Limit
orderOfBattle.battleTally: Number of battles played with this Crusade force

requisitionPoints.gained: 1RP after each battle regardless of result

orderOfBattle.crusadePoints: Measure of upgrades and bonuses a unit has gained. Increases with Battle Honours, decreases with Battle Scars

contents: Models and how many of each
Rules that must be selected before battle
crusadeCards.cannotChange: Once added to Order of Battle — cannot change number of models, wargear, or selectable rules

sources.battleExperience: 1XP — each unit with Crusade card that was part of Crusade army gains 1XP at end of battle
sources.dealersOfDeath: 1XP — for every third enemy unit destroyed (tracked on Crusade card)
sources.markedForGreatness: 3XP — select one unit from Crusade army at end of battle

experiencePoints.nonCharacterCap: Non-CHARACTER units capped at 30XP and Battle-hardened rank (unless Legendary Veterans Requisition used)

INCREASE_SUPPLY_LIMIT.effect: Increase Crusade force Supply Limit by 200 points

RENOWNED_HEROES.cost: 1-3RP (1RP + 1RP per existing Enhancement in Order of Battle, max 3RP)
RENOWNED_HEROES.when: First time adding CHARACTER to Order of Battle, or each time a unit gains a rank
RENOWNED_HEROES.effect: Select one Enhancement that unit has access to (instead of Battle Honour if used on rank gain)
RENOWNED_HEROES.restrictions: Not EPIC HEROES. Not units with existing Enhancement. Not units with Disgraced or Mark of Shame Battle Scars

LEGENDARY_VETERANS.effect: Unit's XP no longer capped at 30. Can be promoted above Battle-hardened. Max Battle Honours increased to 6

REARM_AND_RESUPPLY.effect: Select one unit — change wargear options as per datasheet. Cannot exceed Supply Limit

REPAIR_AND_RECUPERATE.cost: 1-5RP (1RP + 1RP per Battle Honour the unit has, max 5RP)
REPAIR_AND_RECUPERATE.effect: Select one unit with one or more Battle Scars — remove one Battle Scar (Crusade points +1)

FRESH_RECRUITS.cost: 1-4RP (1RP + 1RP per 2 Battle Honours rounding up, max 4RP)
FRESH_RECRUITS.effect: Add models to unit up to maximum on datasheet. Cannot exceed Supply Limit

battleHonours.gaining: Each time a unit gains a rank, it can gain one Battle Honour
battleHonours.atMaximum: Must remove one existing Battle Honour when gaining a new one

weaponModifications.gaining: Select one model in unit (CHARACTER or Unit Champion first), then one weapon. Roll 2D6 for two modifications or choose

modifications.1: FINELY BALANCED — Improve BS or WS by 1
modifications.6: PRECISE — Critical Wounds have PRECISION ability

crusadeRelics.unique: Cannot include same Crusade Relic more than once in Order of Battle

outOfAction.when: End of each Crusade battle — for each unit from Crusade army that is destroyed
outOfAction.roll: D6 — on 2+, test passed, nothing happens. On 1, test failed

devastatingBlow.requirement: Unit must have one or more Battle Honours
devastatingBlow.effect: Remove one Battle Honour. Crusade points -1 (or -2 if TITANIC)

battleScars.crusadePointsEffect: -1 per Battle Scar currently on unit (can be negative)
battleScars.atMaximum: Must choose Devastating Blow result. If no Battle Honours — unit permanently destroyed and removed from Order of Battle

scars.1: CRIPPLING DAMAGE — Cannot Advance. -1" to Move
scars.2: BATTLE-WEARY — -1 to Battle-shock, Leadership, Desperate Escape, and Out of Action tests
scars.3: FATIGUED — -1 to OC of models. Never receives Charge bonus
scars.4: DISGRACED — Cannot use Stratagems to affect. Cannot be Marked for Greatness
scars.5: MARK OF SHAME — Cannot form Attached unit. Unaffected by friendly Aura abilities. Cannot be Marked for Greatness
scars.6: DEEP SCARS — Critical Hits against this unit automatically wound

attachedUnitsInCrusade.battleHonoursAndScars: All Battle Honours and Scars of both Leader and Bodyguard apply to Attached unit
attachedUnitsInCrusade.everyModelRules: Rules specifying 'every model in unit' only apply if both Leader AND Bodyguard have same rule
attachedUnitsInCrusade.outOfAction: If individual Leader or Bodyguard destroyed at end of battle — take separate Out of Action test for each
attachedUnitsInCrusade.xpAndTallies: Each unit gains 1XP for Battle Experience. Combat tallies and bonus XP awarded to either Leader or Bodyguard (your choice, not both)

unitLimits.sameDatasheet: Max 3 units with same datasheet name
unitLimits.battlelineOrDedicatedTransport: Max 6 units with same datasheet name
unitLimits.epicHero: Cannot include same EPIC HERO more than once

musteringCrusadeArmy.dedicatedTransports: Must start with at least one unit embarked or cannot be deployed — counts as destroyed in first battle round

summonedAndReplacementUnits.description: Units added to Crusade army during battle — NOT added to Order of Battle permanently
summonedAndReplacementUnits.outOfAction: Do not take Out of Action tests
